generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VehicleSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Electronic Speed Controller (Vedder) converting desired speed commands into motor voltage for controlling vehicle speed"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component managing steering angle adjustments via servo mechanisms"
]

instance AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Performance-class I adaptive cruise control logic (ISO 15622, Sections 6.1-6.2) computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D object detection and tracking in vehicle's proximity using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Supplementary environmental perception using Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthCameraData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded sensors measuring vehicle speed and steering angle from chassis components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance LiDARProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data pre-processing feature implementing DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    DTDFVocab:serializedFormat ROS2Topics
    DTDFVocab:unitConsistency MetricUnits
]

instance DepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
    DTDFVocab:serializedFormat ROS2Topics
    DTDFVocab:unitConsistency MetricUnits
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:serializedFormat ROS2Topics
    DTDFVocab:unitConsistency MetricUnits
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARProcessingFE
    DTDFVocab:serializedFormat ROS2Topics
    DTDFVocab:unitConsistency MetricUnits
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPath : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:serializedFormat ROS2Topics
    DTDFVocab:unitConsistency MetricUnits
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D point cloud model using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARProcessingFE
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant adaptive cruise control model implementing performance-class I logic for speed computation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackData, EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance EgoVehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing historical ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationService
]

instance ObjectTrackTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series database storing object tracks (position, velocity, size) from LiDAR processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationService
]

instance CADVehicleModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D CAD-rendered representation of the autonomous vehicle for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EnvironmentCADModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "3D CAD-rendered representation of vehicle environment for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware facilitating inter-entity communication and modular software components"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting compute-intensive ACC logic and reporting functions"
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX microcomputer managing autonomy components in upper chassis layer"
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARProcessingFE
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex systems modeling (e.g., point cloud clustering)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for historical data retention of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EgoVehicleStateDatabase, ObjectTrackTimeSeries
]

instance ROS2Visualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based visualization libraries for real-time 3D rendering of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADVehicleModel, EnvironmentCADModel
]

instance CloudCompute : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External cloud infrastructure for offloading compute-intensive ACC control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AdaptiveCruiseControlLogic
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, detected object tracks, and projected driving path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable time-series reports of object tracks and vehicle state stored in SQL databases"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportAction
]

instance ACCComputationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC control logic (speed computation, lead vehicle detection) from vehicle ECUs to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedAdjustmentAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC, speed setting, and emergency braking via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteCommandAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of fuel economy and driving efficiency for performance optimization"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data analysis for brake system health prediction and maintenance planning"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote management commands (emergency braking) based on real-time vehicle state analysis"
]

instance DesignValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "ACC logic validation against ISO 15622 standards for design verification"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path"
]

instance HistoricalReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating and storing historical timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing and applying desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and ACC logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executing remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, emergency braking) via Control Panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Updating system parameters based on performance optimization insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Troubleshooting during development using historical data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, LiDARProcessingFE
]

instance DigitalTwinSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ROS2Middleware, JetsonOrinNano, JetsonNX, MATLABSimulink, CloudCompute
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends virtual-to-physical commands via ROS2 topics to the physical twin, including: (1) **Desired Speed Commands** (from ACC Controlling FE) to the **Motor Actuation FE**, triggering the Vedder Speed Controller to adjust vehicle speed; (2) **Emergency Braking Commands** (via Control Panel UI) to halt the vehicle; (3) **ACC Enable/Disable Commands** (via Control Panel UI) to toggle the adaptive cruise logic. Latency between DT and vehicle is constrained to ≤100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185), with clock synchronization ensuring event ordering accuracy of ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at a **real-time, event-driven time scale** with the following critical rates: (1) **Sensor Data Acquisition**: 30 Hz (typical for LiDAR-based perception systems); (2) **Object Tracking Updates**: 10–30 Hz (Kalman filter refresh rate); (3) **ACC Control Cycle**: 100 ms (per 3GPP TS 22.185), ensuring end-to-end latency ≤100 ms; (4) **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy (NTP or similar) for distributed system coordination. The DT-to-PT synchronization aligns with the physical twin’s autonomy loop (per ISO 15622), where control decisions are validated in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247-based) with custom adaptations: (1) **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Manages sensor preprocessing (LiDAR/Depth Camera), actuation (motor/servo), and data translation; (2) **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Hosts ACC logic, data collection, reporting, and visualization; (3) **User Entity**: Provides a decomposed UI (3D Visualization + Control Panel) for operators/developers. The **Data Translation FE** (ISO 23247) serializes/aligns data between entities. Inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) with ≤100 ms latency."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans the following lifecycle stages: (1) **Design Phase**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC validation (simulated 3D CAD integration); (2) **Development Phase**: Enables remote testing, troubleshooting, and parameter tuning via the UI; (3) **Operational Phase**: Supports real-time monitoring, optimization (e.g., fuel economy), and predictive maintenance (e.g., brake system health). The DT covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical twin, with fidelity validated during development and operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through: (1) **Sensor Calibration**: LiDAR/Depth Camera data validated via ground truth (e.g., manual tracking); (2) **Control Validation**: ACC logic tested against ISO 15622 standards; (3) **Latency Validation**: End-to-end latency ≤100 ms (3GPP TS 22.185); (4) **Uncertainty Handling**: DBSCAN/Kalman filter for object tracking robustness; (5) **Verification/Validation**: Real-time monitoring via the UI and historical data analysis. Validation occurs during development (e.g., emergency braking tests) and operation (e.g., fuel economy optimization)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses: (1) **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (ROS Communication Protocol) for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi (UDP/TCP) for inter-entity (DT-PT) communication; (2) **Communication Topics**: ROS2 topics for data exchange (e.g., `/ego_vehicle_state`, `/object_tracks`); (3) **Data Serialization**: ISO 23247-compliant **Data Translation FE** for unit conversions (e.g., LiDAR coordinates to meters); (4) **Security**: No explicit security protocols mentioned; (5) **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as follows: (1) **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Onboard (NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano) for real-time processing; (2) **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Cloud-hosted for compute offloading (location unspecified); (3) **User Entity**: Web-based UI (not specified) for remote management. Deployment ensures low latency (<100 ms) and distributed scalability. The system follows a **centralized DT architecture** with PTE-DTE communication via Wi-Fi."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with: (1) **External Systems**: Not explicitly detailed, but could include vehicle telematics, cloud-based fleet coordination (e.g., cloud-based ACC management); (2) **Other DTs**: Not applicable in this case study; (3) **Standards**: ISO 15622 (ACC control), ISO 23247 (DT architecture), and 3GPP TS 22.185 (V2V communication). The system prioritizes intra-DT communication over external integration."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is ambiguous but follows a **shared ownership model**: (1) **Physical Twin Owner**: Controls raw sensor data (e.g., LiDAR/Depth Camera outputs); (2) **DT Service Provider**: Owns processed data (e.g., object tracks, reports) for monitoring/optimization. Privacy considerations are not addressed explicitly; however, real-time data transmission (Wi-Fi) may require encryption (not specified)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: (1) **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (entity-based design, Data Translation FE); (2) **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control control logic (performance-class I); (3) **3GPP TS 22.185**: V2V communication latency requirements (<100 ms); (4) **ROS2**: Middleware for inter-entity communication. Custom adaptations include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in ISO 23247) and split UI components."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed as follows: (1) **Safety**: The DT operates in a **Human-in-the-Loop** mode (Fully Autonomous Digital Twin per David & Bork taxonomy), with remote management commands requiring explicit user input; (2) **Cybersecurity**: No explicit security protocols mentioned, but real-time communication (Wi-Fi) could be vulnerable to eavesdropping; (3) **Latency Safety**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency ensures timely ACC actuation (critical for safety); (4) **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy prevents timing attacks; (5) **Validation**: Safety compliance validated against ISO 15622 standards. Remote operations are permitted only for authorized users (e.g., developers/operators)."
]
